prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild scene, Renji Dawnblade in a crimson guild cloak and Mika Emberlane in a cropped travel jacket; Renji Dawnblade initiates a search for a missing guild stamp at the quest board, pointing to a cluttered section of parchment and gesturing for Mika to help him look, cinematic lighting, highly detailed, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild shot; after ten seconds Mika Emberlane spots the hidden stamp, points to it with a swift motion, and Renji reaches over to peel it off the board, handing it to Mika as they share a nod of accomplishment, consistent identities and camera, no text, no watermark.
